senses.gloss: place where the flag is planted in the ground
capital, chief town of a province

examples.text: الشَّاعِرُ لَهُ مَرْكَزٌ مَرْمُوقٌ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
examples.english: The poet has a prestigious position in Arab society.

etymology.text: Noun of place from the verb رَكَزَ (rakaza, “to plant (a flag) in the ground, to settle quietly and remain”).
